content.en:
"The Flesh and Bone Territory is finally going to be promoted to the Eternal Time and Space Territory!"

Ye Tian smiled.

Many eternal years ago, he traded the Heavenly Monument from the Lord of Ice Letter, and put the Heavenly Monument in the origin of the Blood and Bone Territory, which promoted the continuous growth and evolution of the Blood and Bone Territory, but it was not something that could be done without a child to evolve into the Eternal Time and Space Territory, and it would take a certain amount of time.

And this time is not too long for the Immortal Realm Lord.

Now, the Flesh and Bone Territory has finally completed the last step and ushered in the final qualitative change.

Rumble!!!!!

The Blood and Bone Territory continued to expand like a balloon, absorbing endless source energy from the Source Sea.

Moreover, the Blood and Bone Territory is still extracting the energy of the bones in the Blood and Bone Territory.

At this time.

One of Ye Tian's replica bodies was in the Blood and Bone Territory, observing the transformation of the Blood and Bone Territory.

I saw that the Bloodbone Territory continued to grow, and a large number of rare resources were born, and mineral veins, heavenly treasures and rare creatures were born one after another, and the blood-colored power contained in the bones was also absorbed by the Bloodbone Territory, making the Bloodbone Territory a rather special eternal space-time territory.

After a long time, the transformation of the Blood and Bone Territory was completed, and it had become a real Eternal Space-Time Territory, and the Eternal Space-Time Territory that had just been born contained incomparably large resources

Ye Tian was not going to collect these resources, he was going to bring a group of Terran Supreme Beings and Half-Step Eternal Realms from the Dark Forbidden Domain, let them cultivate here, and collect some resources by the way.

In this way, these Terran powerhouses will grow up quickly, and they can also help him manage the Eternal Time and Space Territory well.

"Hey, the bones of that suspected legendary realm lord creature have shrunk a lot, and they're a lot more fragile. "

Ye Tian came to the bottom of the Black Sea, perceiving the skeleton of the Legendary Realm Lord Creature, and muttered.

It can be said that now this Legendary Realm Lord Skeleton can no longer affect the Blood and Bone Territory, and even if it is destroyed, it will not have any impact on the Blood and Bone Territory.

In the following days, Ye Tian moved some Terrans from the Dark Forbidden Domain of the Source Sea to the Eternal Space-Time Territory, and opened a space-time channel to ensure that the Terrans could freely infiltrate the Bloodbone Space-Time Territory and the Dark Forbidden Domain.

That way, he wouldn't have to manage these things, or the Terrans would have to help him if they wanted to go back.

After dealing with these things, Ye Tian began to cultivate hard, striving to raise his cultivation to the seven-step Immortal Realm Lord realm as soon as possible.

With the help of the Mixed Yuan Order, Ye Tian's will and body fused faster and faster, and finally after dozens of Chaheng years, Ye Tian's body and will were fused to a greater than seventy percent, and he stepped into the seven-step Immortal Realm Lord realm.

In order to break through, Ye Tian's strength has also increased a lot, and if he cooperates with the Mixed Yuan Order, he even has the hope of fighting with the weakest Legendary Realm Lord.

Of course, the Immortal Realm Lord and the Legendary Realm Lord have too big a gap in strength between each other, and Ye Tian's strength is still a little behind the six great elders of the space-time territory, but he doesn't have to be afraid of their combat power, and he has a real self-protection ability.

In the following days, Ye Tian's main purpose was not only to improve his cultivation, but also to create various top-notch legendary eternal techniques.

Only the top-notch Legendary Eternal Technique, with the help of the Mixed Yuan Order, can exert the power of the half-step Legendary Eternal Technique.

At present, he only has two top Legendary Eternal Skills, Void Step and Hundred Million Void Void, and the other Legendary Eternal Skills are relatively ordinary, and he is ready to improve and modify those ordinary Legendary Eternal Skills, so that these Legendary Eternal Skills will become top-notch Legendary Eternal Skills.

However, the creation and improvement of the legendary eternal technique, the eternal hybrid realm created by the Hybrid Element Order can play a very good role in helping and referencing.

As a result, Ye Tian continued to try to perfect the legendary eternal technique in the Eternal Hybrid Realm, and one eternal year after another passed.

Before you know it, 100,000 eternal years have passed.

This is also an incomparably long retreat for Ye Tian.

During this period, the half-step Eternal Realm of the human race had increased a lot, and even many Extreme Realms were born, and Ye Tian's family had even stepped into the Eternal Realm Lord level with his help

Compared to Ye Tian, their progress was insignificant.

"Eight-step Immortal Realm Lord, dozens of top-notch legendary eternal techniques, the number of will worlds has reached 99,999, and I am about to break through 100,000 will worlds, my strength is much stronger than in the past." Ye Tian said excitedly.

The 99,999 will worlds are equivalent to the pinnacle of the third-order eternal will, and once it breaks through to 100,000 will worlds, the will world will usher in a metamorphosis and become a fourth-order eternal will.

And the fourth-order eternal will is the will of the Legendary Lord level, and at present, there are only six Legendary Lords who have reached the fourth order in terms of will, while the other immortal realms are only third-order.

If the will breaks through, this will also be a significant increase in Ye Tian's strength, and he may be able to directly make his strength comparable to that of the six major presidents.

However, it was also extremely difficult for this last will world to open up, Ye Tian tried many times, but he was unsuccessful, and he also made the copy body collapse many times

After trying countless times, Ye Tian realized a problem, that is, the secret technique of the world of will is not good, it has major flaws, and it is already too rebellious for Ye Tian to grow to the peak of the third order, and he can use the copy body to try again and again.

Now, he had to re-refine the Will's World Secret Technique before he could break the shackles of his will and be promoted to the Fourth-Order Willdog.

Ye Tian has also obtained a lot of will cultivation secret techniques, and even found some will secret art inheritances in the Silent Void Ruins, but many will cultivation secret techniques are not suitable for him, plus his will world foundation has been completed, and it is not suitable to change secret techniques casually, so he can only learn from the essence of other secret techniques to improve the will world secret arts.

In this way, Ye Tian began to refine the Secret Technique of the Will World.

Anyway, there is a copy of the body as an experiment, so Ye Tian can refine the Modification of the Will World Secret (Nuo's) technique again and again, so that he can improve it quickly.

It only took dozens of eternal years for Ye Tian to successfully raise the Secret Technique of the Will World by a few notches.

The new secret technique of the Will World is to imitate the Source Sea, and use the inner world into the Will Source Sea, and the other Will Worlds into space-time territories, surrounding the entire Source Sea Will World, such a Will World will be very stable, and it is easy to open up a new Will World.

Of course, turning the inner world into a sea of will is a very crucial step, and once such a will world is formed, it will be an incomparably terrifying will world.

He is ready to integrate all his will into such a world of will, and make every effort to open up a sea of will sources

In this process, many will worlds are afraid of collapse, but as long as the will source sea is opened, he can quickly recover.

This was a very bold move, if it weren't for the copy of the body, Ye Tian wouldn't dare to try it. _
